hotels.description_en:
Historic Setting: De Museumkamer in Den Burg offers a spacious homestay housed in a historic building. The property features parquet floors, garden and city views, and a private bathroom with a walk-in shower.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, private check-in and check-out services, bicycle parking, and luggage storage. The homestay includes bathrobes, a tea and coffee maker, and a dining area with a table and sofa.
Local Attractions: Located 6 km from Dunes of Texel National Park and Ecomare, 14 km from De Schorren, and 18 km from Lighthouse Texel. Schiphol Airport is 88 km away. Highly rated for museums, history, and culture.
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 9.6 for a two-person trip.

hotels.description_en:
Close to the beach, Landgoed Hotel Tatenhove Texel features free Wi-Fi throughout and is situated in peaceful natural surroundings. De Duinen Van Texel National Park is only 400 metres away. The hotel features a restaurant, and a spa and wellness centre with a sauna and hot tub.

It is a 5-minute walk to the centre of De Koog, where you will find shops, bars and restaurants. A 15-minute walk will take you to the forest or the beach. There is free car parking and an e-bike charging point on-site.

All the comfortable rooms at this pleasant family hotel have cable TV, telephone and a bathroom with a shower or a bathtub.

At the hotel there is a comfortable lounge with a cosy ambiance, a fireplace and billiards. The dining room with its glass veranda has a great view.

hotels.description_it:
Situato vicino alla spiaggia, l'Landgoed Hotel Tatenhove Texel offre la connessione WiFi gratuita nell'intera struttura e sorge in una tranquilla cornice naturale, ad appena 400 metri di distanza dal Parco Nazionale Duinen van Texel. L'hotel mette a vostra disposizione un ristorante e un centro spa e benessere dotato di sauna e vasca idromassaggio.

In soli 5 minuti a piedi potrete raggiungere il centro di De Koog, dove troverete negozi, bar e ristoranti, mentre in 15 minuti arriverete al bosco o alla spiaggia. In loco troverete un parcheggio gratuito e una postazione di ricarica per biciclette elettriche.

Questo gradevole hotel a conduzione familiare offre confortevoli camere dotate di TV via cavo, telefono e bagno con doccia o vasca.
